questions.question: Explain the difference between a use case diagram and a class diagram in the context of scenario-based modeling. Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Provide a UML class diagram and a use case diagram as examples

questions.question: A software development project requires the creation of a mobile app with payment processing. What type of scenario-based modeling can be used to analyze the requirements of this app, and why?
questions.hint: Consider the actors involved and the types of interactions they have with the system

questions.question: A requirement analysis involves identifying and documenting the functional and non-functional requirements of a software system. How can scenario-based modeling be used to analyze the non-functional requirements of a system, and what UML models can be used to support this analysis?
questions.hint: Consider the use of activity diagrams and state machines to analyze non-functional requirements
